title: Frontend Enhancements at Qvantel
description: Improved internal UI tools by implementing resizable panels, optimizing tab refresh behavior, and resolving cross-browser issues.
Integrated third-party libraries (like react-rnd) and managed complex state with React hooks.
Maintained code quality through ESLint integration and collaborative Git workflows.

title: Flappy Bird Game
description: Developed a Flappy Bird Game using Windows Forms application in C#.
Implemented core gameplay mechanics including physics, collision detection, and scoring.
Designed and managed the UI with event-driven programming and form controls.
Demonstrated proficiency in desktop app development and C# Windows Forms.

title: MathQuizAdventure Game
description: Developed an engaging Windows Forms application to improve math skills through interactive gameplay.
Implemented single-player and two-player modes with multiple difficulty levels and real-time timer.
Designed a leaderboard system with SQL Server/MySQL to track top scores and player details.
Created dynamic random math question generation based on selected difficulty.
Incorporated immersive sound effects and user-friendly UI using event-driven programming.
Utilized Visual Studio for development and Git for version control.

title: Memory Mastermind Game
description: Built an interactive Windows Forms memory game with multiple themes including Animals, Tools, Vegetables, and Fruits.
Designed adjustable game board sizes (4x4 and 6x6) to enhance gameplay variety.
Implemented both single-player and two-player modes for dynamic user engagement.
Added countdown timer functionality to create challenge and urgency in each level.
Enabled customizable background music for an immersive experience.
Used structured event handling to manage user input, game logic, and win conditions.
